## Summary

- Describe what changed and why.

## Testing

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm --filter @war-tracker/web test`
- [ ] `pnpm --filter @war-tracker/validation test`

## Risk and safety checklist

- [ ] I assessed operational/security risk for this change.
- [ ] I documented any required rollout/backout steps.
- [ ] I verified no secrets or sensitive data were introduced.
- [ ] I confirmed monitoring/logging impact (or marked N/A in PR notes).
